title: R30 — Online toggle + live online count (FRND-style)
notes: NEW: 'I'm available to chat' toggle at the top of Anonymous Connect. Green pulsing dot when ON, FRND-style.
NEW: Live count of who's online — '🟢 23 people online now'. Updates every 15 sec automatically.
NEW: Tapping Find Someone auto-enables your availability (so partners can find you).
NEW: Availability auto-expires after 30 min idle. Heartbeat keeps it fresh while the screen is open.
REQUIRES: Migration 0020_anon_availability.sql applied in Supabase (adds is_available_anon + available_until columns + RPCs + count view).
